title: KZ-4 passports manifest repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = '\n'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-4':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:14:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
passport_obj = {
  'version': 1,
  'updated_at': '2026-06-04T15:14:00Z',
  'status': 'active',
  'ssot_note': 'KZ-4 repaired passport JSON after audit found truncation',
  'objects': [
    {'id': 'governance-contour', 'type': 'system', 'status': 'active', 'release_pass': False},
    {'id': 'deno-codex-contour', 'type': 'executor', 'status': 'active', 'release_pass': False},
    {'id': 'workflow-lock', 'type': 'lock', 'status': 'active', 'release_pass': False}
  ]
}
passport_paths = [Path('governance/objects/object_passports.json'), Path('governance/state/object_passports.json')]
for path in passport_paths:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_text(json.dumps(passport_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(path))
manifest_obj = {
  'version': 1,
  'updated_at': '2026-06-04T15:14:00Z',
  'status': 'active',
  'release_pass': False,
  'workflow_files_touched': False,
  'evidence': [
    {'id':'KZ-2','sha':'c708549e49dc0641f9f3b5ad5dc46edef213ce45'},
    {'id':'KZ-2D','sha':'2fec562f121449b6d964fa471755a9e7586dc5b4'},
    {'id':'KZ-4','trace_id':'kz4_repair_passports_manifest'}
  ],
  'files': [str(p) for p in passport_paths]
}
manifest_path = Path('governance/release/release_proof_manifest.json')
manifest_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(manifest_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(manifest_path))
checks = []
all_valid = True
for path in passport_paths + [manifest_path]:
    exists = path.exists()
    size = len(path.read_bytes()) if exists else 0
    parsed = False
    if exists:
        try:
            json.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
            parsed = True
        except:
            parsed = False
    valid = exists and size > 50 and parsed
    if not valid:
        all_valid = False
    checks.append({'path': str(path), 'exists': exists, 'bytes': size, 'json_parse': parsed, 'valid': valid})
status_path = Path('governance/state/kz4_passports_status.json')
status_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
status_path.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'PASS' if all_valid else 'BLOCKED','all_valid':all_valid,'checks':checks,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(status_path))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ4_REPAIR_PASSPORTS_MANIFEST.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-4','trace_id':'kz4_repair_passports_manifest','status':'completed' if all_valid else 'blocked','release_pass':False,'all_valid':all_valid,'kz4_passports_status':str(status_path),'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-4C record KZ-4 result and close queue'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ4_REPAIR_PASSPORTS_MANIFEST.md')
report.write_text('# KZ-4 | Repair passports and release proof manifest' + NL + 'Status: ' + ('completed' if all_valid else 'blocked') + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'Repaired valid JSON files: governance/objects/object_passports.json, governance/state/object_passports.json, governance/release/release_proof_manifest.json.' + NL + 'Created proof: governance/state/kz4_passports_status.json.' + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.' + NL + NL + 'Next: KZ-4C record KZ-4 result and close queue.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
